---
title: "Kenny (Cheng) Qian"
subtitle: |
    Full-Time Stay-at-Home Little Boss \
    PAW Patrol Superfan
image: "files/dengdeng/avatar.png"
resources: "files/dengdeng/*"
about:
    id: pi-info
    template: trestles
    image-shape: round
# date-format: "MMM, YYYY"
page-layout: full
toc: false
search: false
page-navigation: false
title-block-banner: false
---

:::{#pi-info}

Hi everyone! My name is **Dengdeng**. I am 3 years old, and I am growing bigger every day.

My favorite people are Mommy and Daddy ❤️ <br>
My favorite food is little mushrooms 🍄   <br>
My favorite answer to everything is “No, no, no!” 😆

But my super-duper favorite is PAW Patrol! 🐶

Nice to meet you!

## Education

- **Home University** | Since June 2023
    - Major: Eating, Sleeping, Playing, Running, and Laughing
    - Advisors: Mommy and Daddy
    
:::

## Latest News

<!--
To add or edit Dengdeng's news, update the cards below.
Keep up to six cards here. Put photos in files/dengdeng/ and use paths like:
files/dengdeng/photo-name.jpg
-->

<div id="listing-latest-news" class="quarto-listing quarto-listing-container-grid">
<div class="list grid quarto-listing-cols-3">

<div class="g-col-1">
<a href="files/dengdeng/2-years.png" class="quarto-grid-link">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="files/dengdeng/2-years.png" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">Two Years Old 🎂</h5>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>I am two years old, a bigger little boy with bigger birthday cakes!</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small end">
<div class="listing-date">Jun 2025</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="g-col-1">
<a href="files/dengdeng/1-year.png" class="quarto-grid-link">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="files/dengdeng/1-year.png" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">One Year Old 🎈</h5>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>I am one year old, a little boy exploring my big little world!</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small end">
<div class="listing-date">Jun 2024</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="g-col-1">
<a href="files/dengdeng/6-months.jpg" class="quarto-grid-link">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="files/dengdeng/6-months.jpg" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">Six Months Old 🌙</h5>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>I am half a year old! I do not like socks!</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small end">
<div class="listing-date">Jan 2024</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>

<div class="g-col-1">
<a href="files/dengdeng/100-days.png" class="quarto-grid-link">
<div class="quarto-grid-item card h-100 card-left">
<p class="card-img-top">
<img loading="lazy" src="files/dengdeng/100-days.png" class="thumbnail-image card-img" style="height: 150px;">
</p>
<div class="card-body post-contents">
<h5 class="no-anchor card-title listing-title">100 Days Old 😊</h5>
<div class="card-text listing-description delink">
<p>I am 100 days old, with a tiny face, tiny hands, and big smiles!</p>
</div>
<div class="card-attribution card-text-small end">
<div class="listing-date">Sep 2023</div>
</div>
</div>
</div>
</a>
</div>


</div>
</div>
